The '''''Welmo Darb''''' was a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] assigned to the [[First Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|First Fleet]]. It served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]], the joint [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the First and [[Sixth Fleet|Sixth]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]], replacing his older flagship the [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']].

Keeping in Bwua'tu's tradition, it was not the largest or most heavily armed [[Warship/Legends|warship]] in under his command. This was due to the admiral's preference to keep his most powerful warships to the front of a fleet without risking his command structure.

{{Ship-stub}}
